metadata.note: Timeline is a scaffold for planning, not a final historical essay.

events.label: Wheel-center sense
events.description: Lexical references place the foundational sense at the central solid part of a wheel.
events.notes: Secondary lexical dating; primary quotation check still needed.

events.label: Rail transport hub
events.description: Rail and railroad phrases begin to make hub visible as a routing and connection metaphor.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy.

events.label: Business hub
events.description: Economic and institutional language uses hub for clustered access, exchange, and coordination.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy. Early hits are especially noisy for this phrase.

events.label: Innovation hub
events.description: Knowledge-economy language extends hub to organized concentrations of research, entrepreneurship, and exchange.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy. Early hits are especially noisy for this phrase.

events.label: Hub as proud civic center
events.description: The Boston 'Hub' usage shows the wheel-center image expanding into civic centrality and cultural focus.
events.notes: Good scaffold event, but verify wording in Holmes before final use.

events.label: Hubcap compound
events.description: The wheel sense remains productive in mechanical compounds such as hubcap.
events.notes: Compound date from secondary lexical source.

events.label: Airport hub
events.description: Air travel extends hub to route concentration and passenger/traffic interchange.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy.

events.label: Airline hub
events.description: Airline route planning reinforces hub as an operational center in a wider route system.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy.

events.label: Network hub
events.description: Communication and computing make hub a central node or connection device.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy. Early hits are especially noisy for this phrase.

events.label: Digital hub
events.description: Web and platform language uses hub for access points and digital aggregation.

events.label: Content and data hub
events.description: Modern platform language makes hub a container for content, data, resources, and services.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy.

events.label: Hub-and-spoke system
events.description: The hyphenated form marks a system architecture built around a central node and radiating connections.
events.notes: Year comes from Ngram first visible signal; verify with snippets before final copy. Early hits are especially noisy for this phrase.
